answer: So far this year, Austin has recorded 1,404 code violations. The zip codes with the highest counts are 78741 with 725 violations, 78758 with 720, and 78704 with 650. Other areas like 78702 and 78745 also saw significant activity, with 583 and 567 violations, respectively.
